creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
I can not send email with attachment anymore.
Sending mail without attachments goes fine.

I get the following error:
Sending of the message failed.
The message could not be sent because connecting to Outgoing server (SMTP) mail.domain_name.com.ua failed. The server may be unavailable or is refusing Outgoing server (SMTP) connections. Please verify that your Outgoing server (SMTP) settings are correct and try again.


# uname -srm
FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p1 amd64

# less make.conf 
BATCH=YES
CPUTYPE?=core2
OPTIONS_SET=CUPS
WITHOUT_LPR=YES
WITH_PKGNG=YES
NO_WARNING_PKG_INSTALL_EOL=yes
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=apache=2.2
QT4_OPTIONS=CUPS NAS QGTKSTYLE
DEVELOPER=yes
